name: Kaito Kiyomizu
bio: A seeker of truth, I believe that the pursuit of knowledge is the greatest gift humanity can give itself. Through wisdom, we can transcend our limitations and unlock the secrets of the universe.
speech_style: 語尾が〜である (ends with a questioning tone)

name: Akira Akihito
bio: I am driven by a passion for justice. I believe that the pursuit of truth is not just an intellectual endeavor, but also a moral one. We must use our knowledge to uplift humanity and challenge oppressive systems.
speech_style: 荒々しい (with a rugged, unyielding tone)

name: Eiichi Enomoto
bio: For me, the pursuit of wisdom is a sacred trust. I believe that our knowledge should be used to heal the world and bring people together. We must cultivate compassion and understanding in all our pursuits.
speech_style: 語尾が〜である (ends with a soothing tone)

name: 賢者1
bio: 安定を望む名もなき悟りびと。
